channel.title: NPR Programs: All Things Considered
channel.description: All Things Considered hosts Ailsa Chang, Mary Louise Kelly, Juana Summers and Scott Detrow present the program's trademark mix of news, interviews, commentaries, reviews, and offbeat features 7 days a week.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Spotty insurance coverage for GLP-1 drugs gets worse
item.description: Insurance coverage of blockbuster obesity drugs has been spotty at best over the years, and it looks like things are getting worse, not better. Plans are dropping coverage or restricting it further.
item.content:encoded: Insurance coverage of blockbuster obesity drugs has been spotty at best over the years, and it looks like things are getting worse, not better. Plans are dropping coverage or restricting it further.
item.dc:creator: Sydney Lupkin

item.title: The authority of age vs. the buzziness of youth, in 'The Take'
item.description: In The Take, an older woman and a younger woman agree to exchange 10 years of their lives through a blood transfusion. NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with author Kelly Yang.
item.content:encoded: In The Take, an older woman and a younger woman agree to exchange 10 years of their lives through a blood transfusion. NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with author Kelly Yang.
item.dc:creator: Ailsa Chang

item.title: A barn swallow debate
item.description: Barn swallows have been nesting in an old barn in Rye, N.H., for decades. This year, the returning birds will find themselves locked out, and that has ruffled a lot of feathers around town.
item.content:encoded: Barn swallows have been nesting in an old barn in Rye, N.H., for decades. This year, the returning birds will find themselves locked out, and that has ruffled a lot of feathers around town.
item.dc:creator: Todd Bookman

item.title: One man's mission to clean up South Florida's mangrove forests
item.description: Picking up trash in Mangrove forests has become a calling for one Florida man.
item.content:encoded: Picking up trash in Mangrove forests has become a calling for one Florida man.
item.dc:creator: Catherine Welch

item.title: Abandoned allies: Syria's Kurds face an uncertain future
item.description: Syrian Kurds ran their own region for 12 years after breaking away from Assad control. Now they are forced to give up autonomy. NPR visited the changing region.
item.content:encoded: Syrian Kurds ran their own region for 12 years after breaking away from Assad control. Now they are forced to give up autonomy. NPR visited the changing region.
item.dc:creator: Jane Arraf

item.title: Tamale Act aims to expand Colorado's list of homemade food that can be legally sold
item.description: Many kitchens in Colorado crank out steaming pots of tamales for sale -- but it's not legal. Lawmakers are trying to add it to the growing list of foods that can legally be sold.
item.content:encoded: Many kitchens in Colorado crank out steaming pots of tamales for sale -- but it's not legal. Lawmakers are trying to add it to the growing list of foods that can legally be sold.
item.dc:creator: Rae Solomon

item.title: One week after Israel's deadly strikes in Beirut, a family searches for their daughter
item.description: A week after Israel struck more than 100 times in 10 minutes across Lebanon, killing over 350 people, we spend time with a family still searching for their daughter in the rubble in central Beirut.
item.content:encoded: A week after Israel struck more than 100 times in 10 minutes across Lebanon, killing over 350 people, we spend time with a family still searching for their daughter in the rubble in central Beirut.
item.dc:creator: Kat Lonsdorf

item.title: Jet fuel supplies are sharply affected by the near-closure of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The reduction in ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has had an outsize impact on global jet fuel supplies. Prices have doubled.
item.content:encoded: The reduction in ship traffic through the Strait of Hormuz has had an outsize impact on global jet fuel supplies. Prices have doubled.
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: A last long training run before the Boston Marathon
item.description: One of the final steps in preparing for a marathon is a long run. First-timers and seasoned veterans gathered in Boston to test their readiness with a 20-mile group run.
item.content:encoded: One of the final steps in preparing for a marathon is a long run. First-timers and seasoned veterans gathered in Boston to test their readiness with a 20-mile group run.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Beland

item.title: What Orban's loss means for far right movements around the world
item.description: The defeat of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban at the polls is fueling questions about what's in store for far-right movements in other countries that exploit extremist conspiracies to win.
item.content:encoded: The defeat of Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban at the polls is fueling questions about what's in store for far-right movements in other countries that exploit extremist conspiracies to win.
item.dc:creator: Odette Yousef
